source_pr.title: *: When sort data by scanning pkcol, xapi TableScan response should keep order
source_pr.body:
1. Set keepOrder attr in PhyicalTableScan.
2. Set keepOrder attr in XSelectTableExec.

@coocood @hanfei1991 @zimulala PTAL
I will add a test case later.
/cc @siddontang

symptoms: sql := "select * from t order by a limit 1;" (plan/plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql := "select * from t order by a limit 1;" (plan/plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql := "select * from t order by a limit 1;" (plan/plan_test.go)
files: executor/new_builder.go, executor/new_executor_xapi.go, plan/match_property.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/plan_test.go
